description: Non-visual UI status mapping scaffold for AI authorization methods. This file is not wired into product UI.

no_ai.label: No AI
no_ai.misrepresentation_guard: No provider is connected or implied.

setup_required_api_key.label: Setup required
setup_required_api_key.misrepresentation_guard: Must not be labeled as Google account sign-in.

setup_required_oauth.label: Setup required
setup_required_oauth.misrepresentation_guard: Must not show sign-in until an OAuth client and callback are configured.

setup_required_project_key.label: Setup required
setup_required_project_key.misrepresentation_guard: Must not be labeled as ChatGPT account sign-in.

setup_required_workload_identity.label: Setup required
setup_required_workload_identity.misrepresentation_guard: Must not expose identity internals to users.

setup_required_managed_identity.label: Setup required
setup_required_managed_identity.misrepresentation_guard: Must be tenant/environment scoped and metadata-only.

setup_required_byok.label: Setup required
setup_required_byok.misrepresentation_guard: Must not request or display user keys in this scaffold.

setup_required_enterprise.label: Setup required
setup_required_enterprise.misrepresentation_guard: Must not imply user-owned billing or credential control.
